scripts.build: npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
scripts.postbuild: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='frontend/dist/index.html';if(!fs.existsSync(p))throw new Error('frontend/dist missing');const d=fs.readdirSync('frontend/dist/assets').filter(f=>f.endsWith('.js'));if(!d.length)throw new Error('frontend/dist/assets has no JS');console.log('[build] SPA ok:',d[0]);"
